2951733.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2951733.description: To prove that Turtles can be friends with humans, Michelangelo uses a social networking site to befriend Chris Bradford, a famous martial artist who is secretly Shredder's top lieutenant.

2951775.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2951775.description: When the Turtles sneak out against Splinter's wishes (to go to a movie with April), they battle Baxter Stockman, a deranged inventor in mechanical battle armor.

2972983.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2972983.description: Weary of using his simple bo staff to fight the technologically advanced Kraang, Donatello creates Metalhead, a remote-controlled robot turtle, to fight in his place.

2973029.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2973029.description: Donatello and April investigate a scientist's disappearance, but discover a conspiracy regarding a bizarre psychic monkey instead.

2979312.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2979312.description: When the Turtles sneak out against Splinter's wishes (to go to a movie with April), they battle Baxter Stockman, a deranged inventor in mechanical battle armor.

2979372.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2979372.description: Weary of using his simple bo staff to fight the technologically advanced Kraang, Donatello creates Metalhead, a remote-controlled robot turtle, to fight in his place.

2983898.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2983898.description: When the Turtles sneak out against Splinter's wishes (to go to a movie with April), they battle Baxter Stockman, a deranged inventor in mechanical battle armor.

2989697.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2989697.description: Donatello and April investigate a scientist's disappearance, but discover a conspiracy regarding a bizarre psychic monkey instead.

2989751.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2989751.description: Leo fears his act of mercy has come back to haunt him when Xever holds a local noodle shop owner hostage.

3003029.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3003029.description: Weary of using his simple bo staff to fight the technologically advanced Kraang, Donatello creates Metalhead, a remote-controlled robot turtle, to fight in his place.

3005853.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3005853.description: The Turtles enlist the help of the Mighty Mutanimals to stop Bebop and Rocksteady.

3005943.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3005943.description: The Turtles are transported to an alternate dimension where they meet the rabbit samurai, Miyamoto Usagi.

3021656.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3021656.description: The team discovers a Kraang ship buried under April's house where they find... April's Mom! But as April reconnects with her lost mother, is she really all that she seems?

3021705.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3021705.description: An upset Mikey runs away from home and befriends a Mutant Frog in the woods. When he learns its Frog family plans to attack the human world, he has to figure out a way to stop them.

3026662.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3026662.description: Donatello and April investigate a scientist's disappearance, but discover a conspiracy regarding a bizarre psychic monkey instead.

3043203.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3043203.description: Creatures that feed off dreams trap the Turtles inside their own dreams as April and Casey must find a way to wake them up.

3043284.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3043284.description: Casey and Donnie bond over building Casey's new hot rod, but their newfound friendship is challenged by Speed Demon, a hot-rodding mutant who is terrorizing the roads.

3047577.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3047577.description: Leo fears his act of mercy has come back to haunt him when Xever holds a local noodle shop owner hostage.

3009708.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3009708.description: The Turtles must defend their home in the sewers when Bradford tries to destroy it with a dangerous chemical.

3009751.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3009751.description: When simultaneous threats from the Purple Dragons and Baxter Stockman's mechanical Mousers force the Turtles to split into two groups, Donnie & Mikey must prove that their "B Team" is just as valuable as Leo & Raph's "A Team."

3061445.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3061445.description: When Casey, Raph, Mikey and Donnie are captured by a new mutant, both April and Leo must overcome disabilities in order to save them.

3061499.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3061499.description: Leo takes the Turtles to train in the woods in an advanced ninja ritual where they must overcome their weaknesses and face their greatest enemies in order to become true ninjas.

3066237.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3066237.description: After April receives a warning from her imprisoned father, she and the Turtles embark on a mission to save him and stop the Kraang from detonating a mutagen bomb in the city.

3018439.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3018439.description: Michelangelo befriends an unstable mutant alligator who possesses a strange piece of Kraang technology, but the other Turtles aren't sure whether Leatherhead is a friend or a foe.

3018483.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3018483.description: Leonardo, tired of Raphael's constant criticism, lets his brother try his hand at leadership for a while. Meanwhile, Leonardo meets a beautiful and dangerous female ninja who tries to lure Leonardo to the dark side.

3022332.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3022332.description: The Turtles return to the city to search for Splinter, only to find that the city is overrun with Kraang.

3022387.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3022387.description: As the Turtles search for Karai, they have to deal with a city filled with Kraangdroids as well as Zeck and Steranko, who hunt Karai for their own means.

3024509.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3024509.description: The Turtles must defend their home in the sewers when Bradford tries to destroy it with a dangerous chemical.

3027781.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3027781.description: The Turtles must face off against a new enemy, The Rat King, who threatens not only to take control of the city, but Splinter's mind as well.

3027828.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3027828.description: The Turtles get their first taste of high school when April's school project draws Kraang attention.

2986936.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2986936.description: The Turtles meet their first fanboy when a teenage wannabe hero decides to fight crime and dress up as "The Pulverizer."

2986977.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2986977.description: While breaking into the hostile environment of TCRI headquarters, the Turtles discover the true intent of the Kraang and resolve to stop the alien invasion once and for all.

3038458.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3038458.description: After April receives a warning from her imprisoned father, she and the Turtles embark on a mission to save him and stop the Kraang from detonating a mutagen bomb in the city.

3040990.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3040990.description: Michelangelo befriends an unstable mutant alligator who possesses a strange piece of Kraang technology, but the other Turtles aren't sure whether Leatherhead is a friend or a foe.

3042019.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3042019.description: Usagi leads the Turtles through a haunted forest where they encounter mischievous and dangerous spirits.

3042112.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3042112.description: As they reach their destination, Usagi and the Turtles must help Kintaro fulfill his destiny.

2997907.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2997907.description: When simultaneous threats from the Purple Dragons and Baxter Stockman's mechanical Mousers force the Turtles to split into two groups, Donnie & Mikey must prove that their "B Team" is just as valuable as Leo & Raph's "A Team."

3002401.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3002401.description: Leonardo, tired of Raphael's constant criticism, lets his brother try his hand at leadership for a while. Meanwhile, Leonardo meets a beautiful and dangerous female ninja who tries to lure Leonardo to the dark side.

3004444.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3004444.description: An older weathered Raph battles road gangs in a post-apocalyptic mutant wasteland.

3004536.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3004536.description: As they roam the desert wasteland, the team searches for a mysterious hermit, who is the key to finding the mythical Oasis.

3021109.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3021109.description: While the Mighty Mutanimals lay siege to TCRI, the Turtles must brave the bizarre world of Dimension X to save the enslaved people of New York.

3021174.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3021174.description: Casey Jones thinks he can take on the criminal underworld on his own, but he soon finds himself in over his head

3042729.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3042729.description: A new mutant called Muckman starts to gain notoriety as NYC's "Monster Hero

3042780.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3042780.description: The Shredder kidnaps and experiments on the Mighty Mutanimals.

3046361.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3046361.description: The Turtles get their first taste of high school when April's school project draws Kraang attention.

3054614.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3054614.description: After witnessing the Kraang in action, Karai realizes the seriousness of the alien threat and approaches the Turtles to propose an alliance.

3054660.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3054660.description: While the Turtles are infiltrating an undersea Kraang base, the Foot Clan attempts to capture April, forcing her to fend for herself in a battle of wits against Karai.

3060972.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3060972.description: The team must overcome impossible odds to acquire the final Black Hole Generator piece.

3061032.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3061032.description: When April graduates to full Kunoichi, she faces a deadly new enemy, while the Turtles face the return of some old, dangerous foes...

3064885.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3064885.description: The Turtles meet their first fanboy when a teenage wannabe hero decides to fight crime and dress up as "The Pulverizer."

3075046.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3075046.description: When Shredder schemes to create a fearsome army of mutants, the Turtles have no choice but to rely on the help of the newest recruit to the Foot Clan: The Pulverizer!

3075090.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3075090.description: After Leonardo, Raphael, and Donatello fall under the control of a parasitic Wasp, Michelangelo must fight his brothers to save them.

3080647.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3080647.description: The team faces Stockman-Fly's new insect minions, and Raph has to man up to overcome his fear of insects and lead the team.

3080704.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3080704.description: Mikey befriends two odd new Superheroes, Wingnut and Screwloose!

3083787.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3083787.description: While breaking into the hostile environment of TCRI headquarters, the Turtles discover the true intent of the Kraang and resolve to stop the alien invasion once and for all.

3091644.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3091644.description: Donatello breaks into a secret Kraang detention center in order to rescue Kirby O'Neil. But when he discovers they are trapped inside with a deadly mutant prisoner, he realizes that breaking in was the easy part.

3091686.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3091686.description: As the Turtles make a desperate assault on TCRI to shut down an alien portal, they find themselves engaging in the most difficult battle yet.
